measures.name: Total Emissions tCO2e
measures.business_definition: Total greenhouse gas emissions in metric tons CO2 equivalent.
measures.validation: Reconciles to sum of fact_emissions emissions_tco2e.

measures.name: Carbon Cost USD
measures.business_definition: Financial exposure if emissions are priced at the selected carbon price scenario.
measures.validation: Total emissions multiplied by scenario price.

measures.name: Probability Weighted Carbon Cost USD
measures.business_definition: Scenario exposure weighted by scenario probability.

measures.name: Supplier Intensity tCO2e per $M Spend
measures.business_definition: Supplier emissions normalized by supplier spend.

measures.name: High Risk Supplier Emissions tCO2e
measures.business_definition: Supplier emissions tied to high-risk suppliers.
measures.validation: Reconciles to fact_supplier_month filtered by carbon_risk_tier.

measures.name: Abatement ROI
measures.business_definition: Annual benefit from savings and avoided carbon cost divided by capex.
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [Abatement Annual Benefit USD], [Abatement Capex USD] )
measures.validation: Uses initiative-level capex, opex savings, and selected carbon price.

measures.name: Planned Abatement Capex USD
measures.business_definition: Capital still in planned status and requiring governance approval.
measures.validation: Reconciles to initiative rows with Planned status.
